productDisplayName: Highlander Men Solid Navy Blue Trouser
description: Composition Navy blue chinos made of 100% cotton, has two slant pockets on the sides, two buttoned pockets on the back, belt loops on waistband, and a zipper and button closure on the front Fit Slim Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal setting or line dry Warm iron Soft cotton gives a relaxed look to these smart/casual trousers from highlander. Chinos are the perfect choice for those times when you want to look good but still be comfortable – you can dress up your outfit for an evening occasion by tucking in your formal shirt and adding a belt and leather shoes, or wear these trousers with a slim fitting polo t-shirt for a casual weekend look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32”
